---
title: "Notes"
author: "Riku Matsumoto"
date: "2025-11-06"
output: html_document
---
NOTES FOR PROJECT

- Overarching Variables: Income ", Rent, Housing (home ownership, home value),
                         Poverty Rate, Unemployment Rate, 


- Specifics: 
  - Over Time
    - economic downturns
  - Age "B25007"
  - Region -
  - Education "B15003"
  - Commute Time "B08303"
  - Public Transit "B08301"
  - Population Density "B01003"
    - urban vs rural
  - State > County Hover
  - Energy?? "B25040"
  - Year structure built "B25034"
  - Median Mortgage vs Median Rent
  
  Connor: Mortgage
  Sebastian: Age
  Oscar: Rent burden
  Riku: Education
  
  
  
  
IDEAS:
- Year slider
- Hover over
- grey out states with 
- rent_to_income map top 5 states top and bottom affordability
